decisions.next_action: Create a scoped workbook/source delta for Title VI and USDA nondiscrimination sources if this candidate family is promoted to source_only or active in a later milestone.

not_current_source_candidates.reason_not_current: Executive Order 14148 revoked Executive Order 12898; do not add revoked environmental-justice executive-order text as a current controlling authority.
not_current_source_candidates.title: Executive Order 12898 environmental justice text

not_current_source_candidates.reason_not_current: Executive Order 14173 revoked Executive Order 14096; do not add revoked environmental-justice executive-order text as a current controlling authority.
not_current_source_candidates.title: Executive Order 14096 environmental justice text

decisions.rationale: Milestone 2 documents the source gap rather than adding rows because the current authoritative civil-rights coverage should not be satisfied by revoked environmental-justice executive orders. A later source delta should add official Title VI and USDA nondiscrimination sources with workbook row identity, downloader provenance, and catalog validation.

recommended_source_records.title: Civil Rights Act of 1964 Title VI, 42 U.S.C. 2000d
